notes: retail_thb/usd/eur anchored verbatim to the vendors cost-plus stack so the two catalogs agree; retail_sgd derived = retail_thb / 25.4276 (THB per SGD, NOK snapshot-coherent) x SG-GST-mult (1.0, Nubo not GST-registered). Retail is EX-VAT for THB/USD/EUR.
